summary.lv: Entain NCE meklē Sportsbook Analytics Manager, lai vadītu analītikas funkciju sporta likmju komandā un sniegtu darbojošus ieskatus, kas veicina veiktspēju un rentabilitāti.
summary.en: Entain NCE seeks a Sportsbook Analytics Manager to lead the analytics function, delivering data-driven insights that drive performance and profitability in a fast-paced betting environment.
